repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(memory): show dreaming status without active search backend
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Preserve the existing `No active memory plugin` doctor diagnostic when memory search is configured but no active backend resolves.
- Also render the available memory-core dreaming status in that configured-no-backend path.
- Keep the repair scoped to #87637 and source PR #92165 without changing memory-provider discovery, memory-search enablement, or unrelated doctor output.

## Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92165 by @bennewell35.
Issue context: #87637 by @olveww-dot.
Clownfish is repairing the existing contributor path so attribution stays with the original PR.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-memory-search.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Codex `/review` before final update.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @bennewell35 on source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92165.
